title: Weekly Vessel Valuations Report, February 28 2023
summary:
Main
Bulkers : Bulker values have firmed
Capesize Agia Trias (185,800 DWT, Jul 2002, Kawasaki) sold to unknown Chinese buyers for USD 12.50 mil, VV Value USD 12.63 mil - SS Due. Capesize Navios Felix (181,200 DWT, Sep 2016, Imabari) sold to Navios Maritime Partners LP for USD 40.70 mil, VV Value USD 39.36 mil - Scrubber. Supramax Pacific Dream and Pacific Vision (56,500 DWT, Jul 2013-Aug 2013, Jiangsu Hantong Ship Heavy Industry) sold to undisclosed buyers in an en bloc deal for USD 31 mil, VV Value USD 29.98 mil - SS/DD Due.
